basic_details.short_information: Defence Research and Development Establishment (DRDO DRDE) Recruitment 2026 for posts of Junior Research Fellow (JRF). Candidates with M.Sc Can attend Walkin. The Walkin Interview on 17 June 2026, 18 June 2026. For detailed information please visit DRDO DRDE official website.

age_limit.age_details: Max 28 years, relaxable for SC/ST (5 years) and OBC (3 years).

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry or Life Sciences/Zoology/Biotechnology/Molecular Biology/Microbiology/Pharmacology/Toxicology/Immunology with CSIR/UGC/DBT/ICMR JRF Fellowship.

seo_tags: DRDO DRDE Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
